title: [codereview-pass3-robustness-2] Multi-root beacon conflict and desync state machine still underspecified in 02a
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md after first chunk edit: The multi-root mention at line 158 is too brief. No state machine diagram or table for desync recovery transitions (e.g. DRIFTING->ACQUIRING on RPL version change). No detail on how RPL DODAG version increment during join/drift interacts with TDMA SFN reset or time-provider stratum update. P1 for robustness pass. Must expand before next chunk. Per mandatory 3x codereview.
